title: Komplex Kai
summary: April 11, 2016 Komplex Kai has been making hip-hop music for a decade. Born Kisar Jones-Fryberg, he is a 28-year-old member of the Tulalip Tribe from Tulalip, Washington. Kai is passionate about sharing the struggles he and people around him faced growing up on the Tulalip Indian reservation. He was...
